target.description: CSS selector string or `null` specifying where the portal content is appended. Defaults to `document.body` when `null` or omitted.

disabled.description: When true, renders the content inline in normal document flow instead of teleporting it to the target.

class.description: Additional class applied to the portal wrapper element.

inheritAttributes.description: When true (default), HTML attributes passed to the portal are forwarded onto the wrapper element inside the target.
